patch.value: Investigate validate/health telemetry classification (71-74% failure rate)

KPI report 2026-05-16 shows validate=73.68% and health=71.71% finish_failure_rate over 7d. Both commands intentionally exit non-zero when findings exist; the classifier counts these as command_failed. Add a soft-failure resolution (e.g. validation_findings, health_findings) so KPIs distinguish bugs from intentional non-zero exits.
validate/health soft-failures (run completed; findings present) reported as a distinct resolution code; KPI report shows realistic error rates for diagnostics family.
